title: cryptantha intermedia var. rigida
intro: Cryptantha intermedia var. rigida is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cryptantha intermedia var. rigida include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
